{{Quote|Curse that monster!|Kkrax, fuming about Boba Fett's viciousness|<ref name="SWG:RotW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref>}}
'''Kkrax''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who resided in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Restuss]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. Sometime following [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] tasked a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] with the job of hunting down an individual named [[Uff Wogo]], who had a high bounty on his head. In the search for information, the spacer sough Kkrax at the [[Restuss refugee camp]]. Kkrax at first revealed no information to the spacer, apparently not wanting to get involved with the situation. In order to intimidate him, the spacer opened the small box that Boba Fett had given him. Inside was a piece of cloth, and a severed finger with a ring still on it.

Kkrax, sickened by what he had just seen, became more cooperative. He informed the spacer that he would need to go the [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] [[Dantooine system/Legends|system]] to intercept [[Ogveer]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who helped Uff escape.

==Behind the scenes==
Kkrax appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
